conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้

inference_gap.problem: H-G1.22 tested the gamma proxy on only 2 baseline closed trades that intersected the gamma-proxy date set, while all gamma-filtered variants collapsed to 0 active trades.
inference_gap.why_more_data_may_be_justified: The current result is underpowered because of sample overlap, not because the signed-OI gamma proxy mechanism was economically falsified.
inference_gap.why_more_data_is_not_yet_approved: More data would be a sample-expansion project. It must first estimate expected overlap, regime coverage, MinTRL/PSR feasibility, and cost before any purchase or strategy claim.

sample_expansion_sequence.name: no_paid_local_cache_overlap_scan
sample_expansion_sequence.purpose: Use only existing baseline trades, cached quote days, macro/VIX labels, and existing gamma artifacts to estimate how many additional gamma-valid dates could intersect Sub-System A trades without new paid data.
sample_expansion_sequence.verification: Write a scan summary with candidate dates, expected trade overlap, train/OOS split, volatility buckets, macro/no-macro counts, and explicit zero-paid-data guardrails.

sample_expansion_sequence.name: mintrl_psr_feasibility_gate
sample_expansion_sequence.purpose: Before any data purchase, state the Sharpe null threshold, expected return series granularity, and the conditions under which MinTRL and PSR can be computed after the expanded sample exists.
sample_expansion_sequence.verification: The gate must mark the plan blocked if expected active trades remain too small to estimate skewness, kurtosis, first-order autocorrelation, or a meaningful Sharpe distribution.

sample_expansion_sequence.name: targeted_cost_gate_only_if_overlap_scan_passes
sample_expansion_sequence.purpose: Estimate cost only for named dates and named fields needed to clear the overlap/regime gap; never buy broad calendar data from this plan alone.
sample_expansion_sequence.verification: A metadata-only cost estimate must pass the active cost guard before any download, and user approval is required if a new provider is introduced or projected cost exceeds the guard.

sample_expansion_sequence.name: new_preregistered_ablation_only_after_data_validity
sample_expansion_sequence.purpose: If sample expansion later passes coverage and cost gates, create a new preregistered ablation rather than reusing H-G1.22.
sample_expansion_sequence.verification: The new ablation must lock variants, chronological split, search log/DSR policy, MinTRL/PSR reporting, implementable PnL, and big-day dependency before reviewing strategy PnL.

minimum_evidence_requirements.sample_size_rule: No fixed N is accepted as universal. The expanded sample must compute MinTRL/PSR from the observed return distribution, including sample length, skewness, kurtosis, and first-order autocorrelation where estimable.
minimum_evidence_requirements.pre_purchase_warning_floor: If the no-paid overlap scan cannot plausibly produce enough observations for Sharpe inference, the plan must remain blocked instead of buying more data.
required_regime_coverage: low, normal, and high volatility buckets where data exists
stress or high-volatility subperiods when available
trend or momentum regime labels when already available without lookahead
gamma/liquidity regime buckets only when the signed-OI gamma proxy passes timestamp and coverage gates
required_reporting: active trade count before and after every gamma filter
MinTRL and PSR or explicit blockers
mid PnL and implementable PnL with cost drag
under-sampled and underpowered labels whenever sample length is below MinTRL or inference inputs are not estimable

cost_policy.cap_extension_policy: Cap extension is allowed only by real payment on the existing Databento account. Multi-account signup-credit harvesting is prohibited.

forbidden_actions: Do not use H-G1 as a trading filter from this plan.
Do not approve paper trading from this plan.
Do not buy paid data from this plan alone.
Do not claim true market-maker net gamma or dealer net gamma from the signed-OI gamma proxy.
Do not add new gamma strategy variants or tune OOS before a new preregistered ablation.
Do not buy broad calendar data; every future pull must name the inference gap, dates, fields, expected overlap, regime gap, and cost guard.
tier_blockers: no MinTRL/PSR computed for an expanded sample yet
no paid cost gate passed for new H-G1 data
